case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. JOEL NICK MENDOZA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,462.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER  & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, JOEL NICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.96 - SERVED FEB-10-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, JOEL NICK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER  & TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER  & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, JOEL NICK $2,462.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,507.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER  & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, JOEL NICK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-25-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF DOES NOT WANT A JUDGMENT ENTERED; BUT PLAINTIFF WANTS A PROGRESS REPORT IN 90 DAYS DURING WHICH DEFENDANT WILL BE PLACED ON AN INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN" PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506) PARTIES.
